item.title: FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 1h Behdad Eghbali: “We’ve got to be better on a few things, to add more ready-made pl
item.description:
Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 1h Behdad Eghbali: “We’ve got to be better on a few things, to add more ready-made players at this part of the project, to take it to the next level, to be consistent over time”.
“We recognise we need balance. We have world champions, we have Champions League winners, we have Mostrar más 276 160 1 mil 138 mil

item.title:
FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 1h Behdad Eghbali: “There is a plan. We reflect on the plan”.
“We try to improve the
item.description:
Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 1h Behdad Eghbali: “There is a plan. We reflect on the plan”.
“We try to improve the plan and tweak the plan if it’s not working. The message is we’re committed”, said at CAA World Congress via @TheAthleticFC . 183 90 871 94 mil

item.title: FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 2h Behdad Eghbali on Rosenior: “We think he has every attribute to be successful here
item.description:
Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 2h Behdad Eghbali on Rosenior: “We think he has every attribute to be successful here”.
“He got off to a great start. We’ve had a tough past five, six matches, but I think we’re behind Liam”.
“Of course, it’s a results business, but we think he can be successful long term”. 297 174 2 mil 168 mil
